fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: EIP-8282 (builder execution requests via system contract) proposed for Glamsterdam; separates builder and validator deposit paths
Consensus: EIP-8282 is the right design; correctness over speed; contract audit needed (est. 1-2 months)
Splitting EL/CL forks proposed by Dragan; Potuz and Barnabas push back — ePBS needed before gas limit increase due to block propagation constraints
Glamsterdam devnet-6 target: next Wednesday (June 25); plan to include EIP-8282 alongside remaining repricing EIPs

testing_progress.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-5 stable but Prysm has gossip/PeerDAS column issues causing fallback to initial sync; Grandine fixing edge cases
No test vectors yet for all remaining devnet-6 EIPs; Spencer targeting Monday for readiness

eip_proposals_glamsterdam.highlight: SSZ Engine API (execution-apis PR #793): 3+ client implementations exist; Prysm nearly ready; not high priority vs. fork work

action_items.action: EL teams review EIP-8282 system contract and confirm implementation scope before ACDE Thursday
Review updated execution-apis PR #793 (SSZ Engine API) and align implementations to new spec

decisions.decision: Correctness over speed: EIP-8282 will be included in Glamsterdam; formal ratification at ACDE Thursday
EIP-8282 targeted for glamsterdam-devnet-6 alongside remaining repricing EIPs; devnet-6 target next Wednesday

targets.target: Test vectors for devnet-6 EIPs — Spencer targeting Monday June 23
EIP-8282 go/no-go decision — ACDE Thursday June 18
